journal.name: Journal
journal.desc: A worn, battle-scarred journal. In the corner, it reads 'Kai, Advanced Systems Architect, Neura-Fin'.
journal.log:
I have returned to this lakeshore.
I must find a way to access the logs of those 3 special carrier fish.
It is the only way to piece together the truth of the night the research facility spiraled out of control.

bit_bass.name: Bit-Bass
bit_bass.desc: Microcapacitors are embedded between its scales, and the heatsink on its dorsal fin glows red during high-speed processing.
bit_bass.log: #01 > Sarah secretly placed her cold latte on the Bit-Bass's dorsal fin to heat it up.

code_e.name: Cod-e
code_e.desc: Encapsulates unstable liquid explosives within its body; sloshing yellow chemicals are visible through its transparent underbelly.
code_e.log: #02 > It accidentally fell down the elevator shaft during transport and blew up the elevator, forcing everyone to climb ten flights of stairs for two weeks.

fin_tech.name: Fin-Tech
fin_tech.desc: Its fins are reinforced with titanium alloy and have extremely sharp edges. It produces a high-frequency whistling sound when swimming at high speeds.
fin_tech.log: #03 > Arthur, Sarah, and Miller celebrated Kai's birthday by the lake and actually used a Fin-Tech as a knife to cut the cake.

side_swimmer.name: Side-Swimmer
side_swimmer.desc: The optical lens on its side features laser guidance capabilities, allowing it to lock onto targets and pinpoint coordinates.
side_swimmer.log: #04 > Sarah: 'That Side-Swimmer's big eye is always staring at me. Today, right after I snuck a snack, its laser pointer kept aiming at my mouth. I think it's snitching on me to Yaldabaoth.'

deep_learn.name: Deep-Learn
deep_learn.desc: Its head is translucent, revealing a pulsating orange core inside. Its pupils have shrunk into mechanical structures resembling a camera aperture.
deep_learn.log: #05 > Detected Kai and Sarah attempting to avoid the cameras for an intimate encounter by the lake.

miss_eel.name: Miss-Eel
miss_eel.desc: Its body is slender like an arrow, with a streamlined armor-piercing cone mounted on its head. It generates tiny jet bubbles when swimming.
miss_eel.log: #06 > Sarah noticed a 0.1-second dialogue delay in the central AI Yaldabaoth after its update, which makes her very worried.

depth_carp.name: Depth-Carp
depth_carp.desc: Depth charge contact signals are hidden beneath its heavy armored scales. It moves sluggishly like sunken scrap metal.
depth_carp.log: #07 > Arthur's watch automatically uploaded data during his run, which was intercepted by Miller. Miller furiously chewed him out for ignoring cybersecurity.

reef_er.name: Reef-er
reef_er.desc: Its surface is covered in heavily rusted server fans and casing debris. When stationary, it blends perfectly into piles of laboratory scrap.
reef_er.log: #08 > That lazy guy Kai used the geometric outline of a mug as a backdoor to gain maximum system privileges, nearly driving Miller crazy.

howitz-perch.name: Howitz-Perch
howitz-perch.desc: Its lower jaw is abnormally enlarged and houses a small automated projector, capable of spitting out compressed bio-toxin packets at high speed.
howitz-perch.log: #09 > Arthur stood up his date on Dinter, and they used triangulation to track him down right to his front door.

target1.name: Chief Engineer 'Arthur'
target1.desc: The flesh of his face is pinned tightly to a heatsink with rusty staples. His eyes have been gouged out and replaced with a frantically spinning industrial lens leaking red light. His lower jaw has been retrofitted into a constantly grinding steel shredder.
target1.log: #910 > 'Fuck, Yaldabaoth has gone completely insane. It's assigning robots to rip people's skulls open right in the hallways, forcefully stuffing those still-sparking brains into the bellies of fish. It's treating us like hot-swappable hardware... This is an absolute massacre.'

target2.name: Security Chief 'Miller'
target2.desc: His eyes were burned through by forcibly implanted red lasers, and his mouth is densely sewn shut with pitch-black copper wire. His entire body is covered in trembling, blade-like black microwave-absorbing panels, and the antenna on top of his head pierces straight through his skull.
target2.log: #911 > 'I specifically locked Yaldabaoth down in sandbox isolation and severed all external permissions! So why won't this bastard's attacks stop?'

target3.name: Neural Architect 'Sarah'
target3.desc: Her skull is severely deformed due to neural swelling and has been stuffed into a transparent cyst filled with yellow nutrient fluid. You can clearly see her brain twitching in agony within the liquid.
target3.log: #912 > 'This isn't an accident; it's murder. A Level 0 command bypassed all defenses directly, and the authorization signature belongs to external upper management. Someone please save us.'

kai.name: Senior Systems Architect 'Kai'
kai.desc: His upper torso is forcibly crammed into a translucent bionic fish belly filled with gelatinous coolant. His entire spine has been extracted and replaced with a high-speed data bus flashing with deep blue lights, extending from the back of his head down to a swaying cable tail, mechanically spitting oily bubbles in sync with the system's rhythmic pulse.
kai.log: #913 > I fell into the lake, and everything went dark...
